executives.name: Shantanu Narayen
executives.background: Mr. Narayen has served as Chair of the Board since January 2017, as Chief Executive Officer since December 2007 and as President since January 2005. He has been a director since September 2007. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from July 2005 to December 2007.

board_of_directors.name: Shantanu Narayen
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Narayen has served as Chair of the Board since January 2017, as Chief Executive Officer since December 2007 and as President since January 2005. He has been a director since September 2007. He previously served as Chief Operating Officer from July 2005 to December 2007.
